features.name: large genvar for loop in generate block
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a genvar for loop that iterates a large number of times based on a parameter

features.name: variable width part select in expression
features.description: Code should include a variable-width part select where both the start and end indices depend on a genvar or loop variable

features.name: dynamic concatenation with replication in comparison
features.description: Code should include a concatenation with replication where the repeat count depends on a genvar variable, used in a comparison expression

features.name: priority encoding via multiple always blocks with cross-iteration if conditions
features.description: Code should include multiple always @(*) blocks each containing an if statement where conditions span different iterations of a generate loop, creating a priority encoding pattern

features.name: mux tree triggered by large parameter with clog2 sizing
features.description: Code should include a module with parameter sized by $clog2 of another parameter, creating a MUX tree structure that scales exponentially with the parameter
